cancelled.message: The export was cancelled. No file was saved.

complete.audioSuccess: Your audio is ready to download.
complete.videoSuccess: Your video is ready to download.

dialog.descCancelled: The export was cancelled before it finished.
dialog.descProgress: Rendering your video. This can take a few minutes.

errors.verifyCodec: Couldn't verify codec support for the current settings.

progress.keepTabOpen: Keep this tab open until the export finishes.

settings.audioOnlyNote: Audio-only export — no video will be included.
settings.cannotEncode: No supported encoder for {{width}}×{{height}} at the selected quality.
settings.codecSupportUnverified: Couldn't verify codec support. Exporting may still work, but compatibility isn't guaranteed.
settings.embedSubtitlesDescription: Include transcript captions as a subtitle track in the exported file.
settings.embedSubtitlesMp4Note: MP4 stores subtitles as a separate track. Some players may not show them by default.
settings.embedSubtitlesUnsupported: {{container}} doesn't support embedded subtitles. Choose MP4, MKV, or WebM.
settings.inOutRangeHint: Only the selected in/out range will be exported.
settings.noTranscriptSegments: No transcript captions available to embed.

subtitleMode.offDescription: No captions in the exported video.
subtitleMode.burnDescription: Captions are drawn into the video — visible in every player.
subtitleMode.sidecarDescription: Clean video plus a separate .srt subtitle file.

videoContainer.mov: Apple ecosystem, best in Final Cut and QuickTime
videoContainer.webm: Open, modern container for web playback
videoContainer.mkv: Flexible container with strong subtitle support

empty-range.title: Nothing to export
empty-range.detail: The selected export range has no frames.
empty-range.fix: Add timeline content or choose a non-empty in/out range.

video-codec-unavailable.title: Selected format cannot be encoded
video-codec-unavailable.detail: This browser cannot encode the selected export settings.
video-codec-unavailable.fix: Choose a different format/codec or try a recent Chromium browser.

audio-export-ready.title: Audio export ready
audio-export-ready.detailDefaultCodec: {{container}} audio will use the default audio codec.

video-codec-fallback.title: Codec fallback will be used
video-codec-fallback.detail: The selected codec is unavailable here. FreeCut will export {{codec}} in {{container}} instead.
video-codec-fallback.fix: Keep this fallback or choose another supported codec manually.

video-codec-supported.title: Video codec supported
video-codec-supported.detail: {{codec}} can be encoded as {{container}} in this browser.

worker-unavailable-fallback.title: Worker export unavailable
worker-unavailable-fallback.detail: This browser/session cannot start export workers, so rendering will run on the main thread.
worker-unavailable-fallback.fix: Keep the tab focused and avoid heavy interaction during export.

worker-animated-image-fallback.title: Animated images require main-thread export
worker-animated-image-fallback.detail: GIF/WebP image items cannot render in the export worker yet. FreeCut will fall back automatically.
worker-animated-image-fallback.fix: For faster worker export, replace animated images with video clips before exporting.

worker-audio-context-fallback.title: Audio mix requires main-thread fallback
worker-audio-context-fallback.detail: OfflineAudioContext is not available in the export worker, so audio rendering will run on the main thread.

missing-media-blocks-export.title: Missing media blocks export
missing-media-blocks-export.detail: {{count}} referenced media file is missing or needs permission.
missing-media-blocks-export.detail_one: {{count}} referenced media file is missing or needs permission.
missing-media-blocks-export.detail_other: {{count}} referenced media files are missing or need permission.
missing-media-blocks-export.fix: Relink missing media from the Media Library before exporting.

large-file-risk.title: Large export file expected
large-file-risk.detail: This export is estimated around {{size}} before container variance.
large-file-risk.fix: Use Balanced or Small, lower resolution, or export a shorter range if disk space is tight.

long-export-risk.title: Long export may take a while
long-export-risk.detail: This export is about {{minutes}} minutes long.
long-export-risk.fix: Export a shorter in/out range first if you want a quick validation render.

worker-export-ready.title: Worker export path ready
worker-export-ready.detail: The export worker can render this composition without a known main-thread fallback.
